title: Nio (NIO) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Q4 2024 performance showed company delivered total of 72,689 smart EVs, setting new quarterly record. For full year 2024, company achieved total deliveries of 221,970, marking 38.7% year-over-year increase. For 2025 guidance: Q1 targeting year-over-year growth of 36%-43%, approximately 40% year-over-year growth for Q1 deliveries. Full-year target remains to double sales volume from 2024. Company introducing nine NIO products under three brands in 2025. Onvo L90 will be unveiled April with deliveries beginning Q3. Management maintains strategy of balancing profitability against volume expansion with targets for improved margins while continuing delivery growth.
